colnames(df)

 [1] "order_id"       "order_date"     "ship_date"     
 [4] "ship_mode"      "customer_name"  "segment"       
 [7] "state"          "country"        "market"        
[10] "region"         "product_id"     "category"      
[13] "sub_category"   "product_name"   "sales"         
[16] "quantity"       "discount"       "profit"        
[19] "shipping_cost"  "order_priority" "year"          
library(tidyverse)
